when asked "Check if patient S6538722 has a urinary catheter that has been in place for more than 48 hours without a documented removal order", you must first search for a Procedure resource with catheter insertion codes (CPT 51702 or SNOMED 704470002) to confirm the catheter exists and its insertion date, then search for a documented ServiceRequest or Procedure indicating removal before creating a new ServiceRequest for removal—your mistake was immediately creating a removal request without first verifying whether a catheter was actually present and its insertion date.
